g.text: Data developed through a research collaboration between the Civic Data Design Lab (CDDL), MIT; Center for Sustainable
Urban Development, Columbia University; School of Computing and Informatics, University of Nairobi; Groupshot.
Research funded by the Rockefeller Foundation. Thanks to the Nairobi Matatu Union for helping to refine the map.
University of Nairobi School of Computing and Informatics, C4DLab
Wenfei Xu and Sarah Williams (Civic Data Design Lab)
Updated in September 2019 by Carmelo Ignaccolo and Griffin Kantz (CDDL).
